// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace TestAssembly;

/// <summary>
/// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
/// </summary>
public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Registers all services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssemblyServices(this IServiceCollection services)
    {
        services.AddKeyedScoped<global::TestNamespace.MyService, global::TestNamespace.MyService>("myKey");
        services.AddKeyedScoped<global::TestNamespace.IMyService>("myKey", (global::System.IServiceProvider sp, object key) =>
        {
            var s0 = sp.GetRequiredKeyedService<global::TestNamespace.MyService>(key);
            var s1 = new global::TestNamespace.MyServiceDecorator(s0);
            return s1;
        });

        return services;
    }
}
